tagline: Find leaked revenue before it vanishes.

designSystem.style: Clean, data-forward mobile dashboard with vibrant violet-purple brand color, card-based layout, subtle gradients, and micro-interaction feedback. Light/dark dual-theme with warm neutral backgrounds and electric accent pops.

screens: Home — Revenue radar summary, priority deal card, live signals feed
Deals — Stalled deals list with risk filters, signal badges, recovery scores, drill-down detail view
Renewals — Account health monitor with urgency bars, usage drop alerts, one-tap check-ins
Insights — Recovery score, nudge performance stats, weekly bar chart, best follow-up time windows
Settings — Profile, theme toggle, CRM/email/calendar integrations, notification preferences
